subject: Re: Not-a-Number value error in WarpTools
body:
Good question! I don’t know off the top of my head and shouldn’t go digging into code right now - if you open a GitHub issue I’ll take a look when I get back from vacation though 🙂 otherwise, Dimitry will know and might respond…

Cheers,

Alister

Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity

> On Aug 8, 2024, at 14:21, 3P1L <philipp.stawski@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> So also as potential question for the WARP team: do we still need to manually convert the gain in the same way?
